LHI, VISMAYA, F.K.A. KAREN LEE BURDG
SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST FOR JEFFREY LEWIS BURDG, ESTAB, UNDER THE MARVIN AMD ROBERTA BURDG FAMILY TRUST, DATED AUGUST 17, 1992
THE FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND

calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Nevin for and with (petitioner) Vismaya Lhi.

The Court stated that there is issue in that a great deal is not clear, that was is clear is what happens with the Special Needs Trust (SNT) when the party dies, that any change requires consent of all beneficiaries but that there is not a problem with appointing a successor trustee. Mr. Nelson stated that the trust is confusing, that the examiner's notes talks about 6.04.2(d)(1), that they have 3 affidavits regarding the decedents intention and that it appears they need to file an 850 petition but do not feel there is enough evidence. The Court reiterated that what they are seeking is an amendment of the trust and that they will need the consent of all beneficiaries. Ms. Lhi stated that the trust is full of errors and pointed to the 340 acres that have been transferred to her and her cousin when the trust states that it is 240 acres. The Court asked about the need for bond. Mr. Nelson stated that there is a cash account with about $230,000.00, that Wells Fargo may have deposited an additional $30,000.00 but that they will not know exactly until the appointment of the successor trustee and that they currently have a bond for $230,000.00. The Court stated that it is prepared to sign the order limiting the relief to the appointment of the successor trustee, that the bond is set at $230,000.00, that if they learn of income or additional assets that come in they must request an increase in bond and that they must make a further request, if necessary, for further relief. The Court granted the petition re substituted judgment trust (with respect to appointment of successor trustee only)(subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Nevin for and with Vismaya Lhi.

The Petition for Substituted Judgment was continued to February 11, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to discuss the issues raised by the Probate Examiner with his Client and to determine if he will proceed with petition or amend the petition to request modification of the Trust.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
